code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut arr = xs
  let n = arr.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n
      match arr.get(i)
      when Some(a)
        match arr.get(j)
        when Some(b)
          if a > b
            mut new_arr: List<Int> = []
            mut k = 0
            while k < n
              if k == i
                new_arr = list.push(new_arr, b)
              else if k == j
                new_arr = list.push(new_arr, a)
              else
                match arr.get(k)
                when Some(v)
                  new_arr = list.push(new_arr, v)
                when None
                  ()
                end
              end
              k = k + 1
            end
            arr = new_arr
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  arr
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  let inter = sort_asc(intersect(a, b))
  if inter.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < inter.len()
      match inter.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  end
end
